sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME name, PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: ( STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS like '' OR STATUS IS NULL )

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.CONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CONNECTTIME, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.DISCONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), "") AS DISCONNECTTIME, C.SEQUENCE, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.CONNECTIP, C.CONNECTBROWSER, C.CONNECTOS, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.USERID, C.STATUS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID=#companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#

SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.CONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CONNECTTIME, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.DISCONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), "") AS DISCONNECTTIME, C.SEQUENCE, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.CONNECTIP, C.CONNECTBROWSER, C.CONNECTOS, C.COMPANYID, C.USERID, C.STATUS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# AND C.USERID=#userId#
AND C.COMPANYID=#companyId#
ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID=#userId#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CONNECTTIME < SUBDATE(DATE(NOW()), #v_KEEP_LOG_PERIOD#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='useIPAccess' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ACCESS_IP (TENANT_ID, IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION) VALUES (#tenantID#, #ipAddress#, #access#, #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ACCESS_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPADDRESS, ACCESS, EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS NAME, TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION END AS DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN = TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS NAME, TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT SUM(AVG_ROW_LENGTH * TABLE_ROWS) AS MODULESIZE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'JMOCHA' AND TABLE_NAME REGEXP #tableNames#
AND TABLE_NAME NOT REGEXP #notTableNames#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CREATE_DATE < SUBDATE(DATE(NOW()), #v_KEEP_LOG_PERIOD#)
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE) VALUES (#tenantID#, #companyID#, 'useMultiLogin', #multiLoginType#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #multiLoginType# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'useMultiLogin'

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP SET MENU_USED = #menuUse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
MENU_ID IN
#menuId[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNTRY_CODE COUNTRYCODE FROM TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY SET COUNTRY_CODE = #countryCode# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP (TENANT_ID, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS, EXPLANATION) VALUES (#tenantID#, #ipAddress#, #access#, #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ALLOW_ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#

SELECT count(IPNO) FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP
#ipNoList[]# AND ALLOW_ACCESS ='YES'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE) VALUES (#tenantID#, #companyID#, #name#, #value# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, ENG_CHAR_TYPE, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER, USE_NUMBER, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
SELECT TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USE_PATTERN_COUNT, NUMBER_OF_CHAR FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, ENG_CHAR_TYPE, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER, USE_NUMBER, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR) VALUES (#tenantId#, #companyId#, #engCharType#, #useCapitalLetter#, #useSmallLetter#, #useNumber#, #useSpecial#)
INSERT INTO TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USE_PATTERN_COUNT, NUMBER_OF_CHAR) VALUES (#tenantId#, #companyId#, #settingCnt#, #settingNumber#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY SET ENG_CHAR_TYPE=#engCharType#, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER=#useCapitalLetter#, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER=#useSmallLetter#, USE_NUMBER=#useNumber#, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR=#useSpecial# WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.ACCESSTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS ACCESSTIME, C.SEQUENCE, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.ACCESSIP, C.ACCESSBROWSER, C.ACCESSOS, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.USERID, C.ADMINTYPE FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID=#companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')

SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.AUTHORIZEDTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS AUTHORIZEDTIME, C.SEQUENCE, C.USERID, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.AUTHORIZEDTIME, C.ADMINTYPE, C.STATUS, C.AUTHORIZERID, C.AUTHORIZERNM, C.AUTHORIZERNM2, C.AUTHORIZERIP FROM TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID=#companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME like 'USE_FileExtension'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#fileExtension# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='USE_FileExtension' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO (USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID, TARGET_DEPTNM, TARGET_DEPTNM2, UPDATE_TYPE, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID) (SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2,
#deptId#, #deptNm#, #deptNm2#,
DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2,
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2,
#updatedt#,
UPDATEDT,
#targetDeptId#, #targetDeptNm#, #targetDeptNm2#, #updateType#, #executorId#, #executorNm#, #executorNm2#, #executorIp#, TENANT_ID FROM
TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE
TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE
TBL_USERMASTER
WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

isEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%') OR EXECUTORNM2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%'))

isNotEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%') OR EXECUTORNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%'))

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(UPDATEDT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATEDT, SEQ, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID AS targetDeptId, TARGET_DEPTNM AS targetDeptNm, TARGET_DEPTNM2 AS targetDeptNm2, UPDATE_TYPE AS updateType, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID FROM TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID=#v_tenantID#
ORDER BY SEQ DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#
SELECT COUNT(SEQ) FROM TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID = #v_tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO (DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, PARENT_DEPTID, PARENT_DEPTNM, PARENT_DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID, TARGET_DEPTNM, TARGET_DEPTNM2, UPDATE_TYPE, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID) SELECT #deptId#, #deptNm#, #deptNm2#, #parentDeptId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, #updatedt#, #targetDeptId#, #targetDeptNm#, #targetDeptNm2#, #updateType#, #executorId#, #executorNm#, #executorNm2#, #executorIp#, #tenantId# FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#parentDeptId# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#

isEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%') OR EXECUTORNM2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%'))

isNotEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%') OR EXECUTORNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%'))

sqlMap.select:
SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(UPDATEDT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATEDT, SEQ, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, PARENT_DEPTID AS parentDeptId, PARENT_DEPTNM AS parentDeptNm, PARENT_DEPTNM2 AS parentDeptNm2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID AS targetDeptId, TARGET_DEPTNM AS targetDeptNm, TARGET_DEPTNM2 AS targetDeptNm2, UPDATE_TYPE AS updateType, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID FROM TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID=#v_tenantID#
ORDER BY SEQ DESC
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#
SELECT COUNT(SEQ) FROM TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID = #v_tenantID#

SELECT SEQUENCE, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, USERID, STATUS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND (STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS like '' OR STATUS IS NULL)
AND COMPANYID=#companyId#
AND USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
GROUP BY USERID ORDER BY USERNM
LIMIT #v_start#, #pageCount#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND (STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS like '' OR STATUS IS NULL)
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND USERID LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_keyword#,'%')
GROUP BY USERID) A
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE USED_FRAME != 1 AND USED_FRAME != 5 AND USED_FRAME != 8
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET IS_DEFAULT = CASE WHEN USED_FRAME = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP SET FRAME_USED = CASE WHEN FRAME_ID = 1 OR FRAME_ID = 5 OR FRAME_ID = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, FRAME_DEFAULT = CASE WHEN FRAME_ID = 1 OR FRAME_ID = 5 OR FRAME_ID = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(CODE) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE IS NOT NULL
AND TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR CODEVALUE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(CODE) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE IS NOT NULL
AND TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR CODEVALUE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#

SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2, A.ISDELETEBLOCK AS isDeleteBlock FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (A.CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR A.CODEVALUE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR A.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTNUM#, #v_COUNT#

SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2 FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (A.CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR A.CODEVALUE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR A.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC LIMIT #v_STARTNUM#, #v_COUNT#

SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2 FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.CODE = #CODE#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE = #CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND ISDELETEBLOCK <> 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG (CODE, CODEVALUE, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, TYPECODE) VALUES(#CODE#, #CODEVALUE#, #DESCRIPTION#, #WRITERID#, #WRITERNAME#, #WRITEDATE#, #v_TENANT_ID#, #companyID#, #typeCode#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG SET CODEVALUE = #CODEVALUE#, DESCRIPTION = #DESCRIPTION#, WRITERID = #WRITERID#, WRITERNAME = #WRITERNAME#, WRITEDATE = #WRITEDATE# WHERE CODE = #CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
AND (TYPECODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR TYPENAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR TYPENAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC
LIMIT #startRow#, #pageSize#

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND (TYPECODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR TYPENAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR TYPENAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#,'%'))
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE (TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID) VALUES(#typeCode#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, #description#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writeDate#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE SET TYPENAME = #typeName#, TYPENAME2 = #typeName2#, DESCRIPTION = #description#, WRITERID = #writerId#, WRITERNAME = #writerName#, WRITERNAME2 = #writerName2#, WRITEDATE = #writeDate# WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG SET ISDELETEBLOCK = 'Y' WHERE CODE = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND IPADDRESS = #ipAddress# AND ALLOW_ACCESS = 'YES'
SELECT IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP (TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS, EXPLANATION) VALUES (#tenantID#, #companyId#, #ipAddress#, #access# , #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ALLOW_ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
